debug_info.goal:
x y : EnchantedForest.Introduction.Bird
kestrel_application :
  EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K x =
    EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K y
⊢ x = y

proof:
have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ K = y := K.call y K
      have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by rw [kestrel_application]
      have h₄ : x = y := by
        calc
          x = (K ◁ x) ◁ K := by rw [h₁]
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by rw [h₃]
          _ = y := by rw [h₂]
      exact h₄
failed_attempts:
have h2 : (K ◁ x) ◁ I = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by
      rw [kestrel_application]
    have h3 : (K ◁ x) ◁ I = x := by
      calc
        (K ◁ x) ◁ I = x := by
          -- Apply the Kestrel's property: (K ◁ x) ◁ y = x for any y
          -- Here, we use y = I
          have h4 := K.call x I
          -- Simplify using the given property
          simp at h4 ⊢
          <;> simp_all
          <;> aesop
        _ = x := by rfl
    have h4 : (K ◁ y) ◁ I = y := by
      calc
        (K ◁ y) ◁ I = y := by
          -- Apply the Kestrel's property: (K ◁ y) ◁ z = y for any z
          -- Here, we use z = I
          have h5 := K.call y I
          -- Simplify using the given property
          simp at h5 ⊢
          <;> simp_all
          <;> aesop
        _ = y := by rfl
    -- Substitute back into the equation
    have h5 : x = y := by
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ I := by rw [h3]
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by rw [h2]
        _ = y := by rw [h4]
    exact h5
  exact h1

have h₂ := K.call x (K ◁ x)
      have h₃ := K.call y (K ◁ y)
      have h₄ := K.call x (K ◁ y)
      have h₅ := K.call y (K ◁ x)
      simp [kestrel_application] at h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ ⊢
      <;>
      (try simp_all [response]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₆ := K.call (y := K ◁ x) (x := x)
          have h₇ := K.call (y := K ◁ y) (x := x)
          simp [kestrel_application] at h₆ h₇ ⊢
          <;>
          (try simp_all [response]) <;>
          (try aesop)
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₆ := K.call (y := K ◁ x) (x := y)
          have h₇ := K.call (y := K ◁ y) (x := y)
          simp [kestrel_application] at h₆ h₇ ⊢
          <;>
          (try simp_all [response]) <;>
          (try aesop)
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
    exact h₁

apply K.call
  have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
    have h₃ := K.call y x
    exact h₃
  have h₃ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
    calc
      (K ◁ y) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        rw [kestrel_application]
      _ = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rfl
  have h₄ : y = x := by
    calc
      y = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₂]
      _ = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
      _ = x := by rw [h₁]
  exact h₄.symm

have h₁ : x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        have h := Kestrel.K.call x x
        simp at h ⊢
        <;> aesop
      have h₂ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
        rw [kestrel_application]
      have h₃ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
        have h := Kestrel.K.call y x
        simp at h ⊢
        <;> aesop
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := h₁
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := h₂
        _ = y := h₃

have h1 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
        rw [kestrel_application]
      have h2 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
        apply K.call
      have h3 : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
        have h4 : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
          apply K.call
        exact h4
      have h5 : x = y := by
        calc
          x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h2]
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h1]
          _ = y := by rw [h3]
      exact h5
  end KestrelTheorems

have h₁ := K.call x x
      have h₂ := K.call y x
      have h₃ := K.call x y
      have h₄ := K.call y y
      have h₅ : (K ◁ x) = (K ◁ y) := kestrel_application
      have h₆ := congr_fun h₅ x
      -- Since K ◁ x = K ◁ y, applying both sides to x should give the same result.
      -- By the property of K, (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x and (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y.
      -- Therefore, x = y.
      simp at h₆
      <;> simp_all [Kestrel,K.call]
      <;> aesop

have h₁ := Kestrel.K.call x y
      have h₂ := Kestrel.K.call y x
      have h₃ := Kestrel.K.call x x
      have h₄ := Kestrel.K.call y y
      simp [kestrel_application] at h₁ h₂
      have h₅ : x = y := by
        have h₅₁ := h₁
        have h₅₂ := h₂
        simp [response] at h₅₁ h₅₂ ⊢
        <;>
        (try simp_all [response]) <;>
        (try aesop) <;>
        (try
          {
            have h₅₃ := Kestrel.K.call x y
            have h₅₄ := Kestrel.K.call y x
            simp [response] at h₅₃ h₅₄ ⊢
            <;> simp_all [response]
            <;> try aesop
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            have h₅₃ := Kestrel.K.call x x
            have h₅₄ := Kestrel.K.call y y
            simp [response] at h₅₃ h₅₄ ⊢
            <;> simp_all [response]
            <;> try aesop
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            have h₅₃ := Kestrel.K.call x (K ◁ x)
            have h₅₄ := Kestrel.K.call y (K ◁ y)
            simp [response] at h₅₃ h₅₄ ⊢
            <;> simp_all [response]
            <;> try aesop
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [response]
            <;> try aesop
          })
      exact h₅

apply Kestrel.K.call
  
  have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
    apply Kestrel.K.call
  
  have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
    rw [kestrel_application]
  
  have h₄ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
      _ = y := by rw [h₂]
  
  exact h₄
h₄

have h1 := K.call x I
    exact h1
  have h2 : (K ◁ y) ◁ I = y := by
    have h2 := K.call y I
    exact h2
  have h3 : (K ◁ x) ◁ I = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by
    rw [kestrel_application]
  have h4 : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ I := by rw [h1]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by rw [h3]
      _ = y := by rw [h2]
  exact h4

apply Kestrel.K.call
    have h2 : (K ◁ y) ◁ y = y := by
      apply Kestrel.K.call
    have h3 : (K ◁ x) ◁ y = (K ◁ y) ◁ y := by
      rw [kestrel_application]
    have h4 : x = y := by
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ y := by rw [h1]
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ y := by rw [h3]
        _ = y := by rw [h2]
    exact h4

have h₁ := K.call x x
      have h₂ := K.call y x
      have h₃ := K.call x y
      have h₄ := K.call y y
      simp [anagram_infix] at h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ ⊢
      <;>
      (try simp_all) <;>
      (try tauto) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith) <;>
      (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all) <;>
      (try nlinarith) <;>
      (try linarith)
      <;>
      simp_all [response]
      <;>
      aesop

have h1 : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := by
        have h2 := K.call x K
        exact h2
      exact h1
    have h2 : (K ◁ y) ◁ K = y := by
      have h1 : (K ◁ y) ◁ K = y := by
        have h2 := K.call y K
        exact h2
      exact h1
    have h3 : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by
      rw [kestrel_application]
    have h4 : x = y := by
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ K := by rw [h1]
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by rw [h3]
        _ = y := by rw [h2]
    exact h4

calc
      (K ◁ y) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [kestrel_application]
      _ = x := by rw [h₁]
  have h₄ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
      _ = y := by rw [h₂]
  exact h₄

have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
      have h₂ := K.call x x
      exact h₂
    have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
      have h₃ := K.call y x
      exact h₃
    have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
      rw [kestrel_application]
    have h₄ : x = y := by
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₁]
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
        _ = y := by rw [h₂]
    exact h₄
  exact h

have h₁ := K.call x (K ◁ y)
      have h₂ := K.call y (K ◁ x)
      have h₃ := K.call x (K ◁ x)
      have h₄ := K.call y (K ◁ y)
      -- Simplify the equations using the given condition K ◁ x = K ◁ y
      simp [kestrel_application] at h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄
      -- Use the simplified equations to deduce x = y
      <;>
      (try simp_all [response]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [response]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [response]) <;>
      (try aesop)
      <;>
      simp_all [response]
      <;>
      aesop
  end KestrelTheorems

have h₁ := K.call x (K ◁ x)
      have h₂ := K.call y (K ◁ y)
      have h₃ := K.call x (K ◁ y)
      have h₄ : (K ◁ x) ◁ (K ◁ x) = x := by
        apply K.call
      have h₅ : (K ◁ y) ◁ (K ◁ y) = y := by
        apply K.call
      have h₆ : (K ◁ x) ◁ (K ◁ y) = x := by
        calc
          (K ◁ x) ◁ (K ◁ y) = (K ◁ x) ◁ (K ◁ y) := rfl
          _ = x := by
            have h₇ : K ◁ x = K ◁ y := kestrel_application
            have h₈ : (K ◁ x) ◁ (K ◁ y) = x := by
              calc
                (K ◁ x) ◁ (K ◁ y) = (K ◁ x) ◁ (K ◁ y) := rfl
                _ = x := by
                  have h₉ := K.call x (K ◁ y)
                  simp_all [K.call]
                  <;>
                  (try simp_all [response]) <;>
                  (try simp_all [is_egocentric]) <;>
                  (try simp_all [is_fixated_on]) <;>
                  (try simp_all [is_hopelessly_egocentric]) <;>
                  (try aesop)
            simp_all [K.call]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [response]) <;>
            (try simp_all [is_egocentric]) <;>
            (try simp_all [is_fixated_on]) <;>
            (try simp_all [is_hopelessly_egocentric]) <;>
            (try aesop)
      have h₇ : x = y := by
        calc
          x = (K ◁ x) ◁ (K ◁ y) := by rw [h₆]
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ (K ◁ y) := by rw [kestrel_application]
          _ = y := by rw [h₅]
      exact h₇
  end KestrelTheorems

{
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Eq.symm
      have h5 := K.call x x
      have h6 := K.call y x
      have h7 := K.call x y
      have h8 := K.call y y
      simp [kestrel_application] at h5 h6 h7 h8
      <;>
      (try simp_all [response]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      have h5 := K.call x x
      have h6 := K.call y x
      have h7 := K.call x y
      have h8 := K.call y y
      simp [kestrel_application] at h5 h6 h7 h8
      <;>
      (try simp_all [response]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      apply Eq.symm
      have h5 := K.call x x
      have h6 := K.call y x
      have h7 := K.call x y
      have h8 := K.call y y
      simp [kestrel_application] at h5 h6 h7 h8
      <;>
      (try simp_all [response]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Eq.symm
      have h5 := K.call x x
      have h6 := K.call y x
      have h7 := K.call x y
      have h8 := K.call y y
      simp [kestrel_application] at h5 h6 h7 h8
      <;>
      (try simp_all [response]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    })
  <;>
  simp_all [response]
  <;>
  aesop

have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
    sorry
  have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = x := by
    sorry
  have h₃ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
    sorry
  have h₄ : x = y := by
    sorry
  exact h₄

calc
      (K ◁ y) ◁ y = (K ◁ x) ◁ y := by rw [kestrel_application]
      _ = x := h1
  have h4 : y = x := by
    calc
      y = (K ◁ y) ◁ y := by rw [h2]
      _ = x := h3
  exact h4.symm

x = (K ◁ x) ◁ K := by rw [K.call]
    _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by rw [kestrel_application]
    _ = y := by rw [K.call]

have h₂ := K.call x x
    have h₃ := K.call y x
    have h₄ := K.call x y
    have h₅ := K.call y y
    have h₆ := congr_arg (fun z => z ◁ x) kestrel_application
    have h₇ := congr_arg (fun z => z ◁ y) kestrel_application
    simp [h₂, h₃, h₄, h₅] at h₆ h₇
    <;>
    (try simp_all [response]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try {
      have h₈ := K.call x x
      have h₉ := K.call y x
      have h₁₀ := K.call x y
      have h₁₁ := K.call y y
      simp_all [response]
      <;> aesop
    }) <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [response]
      <;> aesop
    })
  exact h₁

apply Kestrel.K.call
  
  have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
    rw [kestrel_application]
    <;> simp_all [response]
    <;> try rfl
  
  have h₄ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
    apply Kestrel.K.call
  
  have h₅ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₄]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
      _ = y := by rw [h₂]
  
  apply h₅

have h := K.call x x
      have h₁ := K.call y y
      have h₂ := K.call x y
      have h₃ := K.call y x
      have h₄ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by simpa using K.call x x
      have h₅ : (K ◁ y) ◁ y = y := by simpa using K.call y y
      have h₆ : (K ◁ x) ◁ y = x := by simpa using K.call x y
      have h₇ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by simpa using K.call y x
      have h₈ : (K ◁ x) = (K ◁ y) := kestrel_application
      have h₉ : x = y := by
        calc
          x = (K ◁ x) ◁ y := by
            rw [h₆]
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ y := by rw [h₈]
          _ = y := by
            have h₁₀ := K.call y y
            simpa using h₁₀
      exact h₉
  end KestrelTheorems

apply K.call
  
  have h₃ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
    apply K.call
  
  have h₄ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
    rw [kestrel_application]
  
  have h₅ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₂]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₄]
      _ = y := by rw [h₃]
  
  exact h₅

x = (K ◁ x) ◁ y := by
      -- Using the kestrel property to show that (K ◁ x) ◁ y = x
      rw [Kestrel.K.call]
    _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ y := by
      -- Since K ◁ x = K ◁ y, we can substitute
      rw [kestrel_application]
    _ = y := by
      -- Using the kestrel property to show that (K ◁ y) ◁ y = y
      rw [Kestrel.K.call]

calc
      (K ◁ x) ◁ I = x := by
        have h₃ := K.call x I
        exact h₃
      _ = x := by rfl
  have h₃ : (K ◁ y) ◁ I = y := by
    calc
      (K ◁ y) ◁ I = y := by
        have h₄ := K.call y I
        exact h₄
      _ = y := by rfl
  have h₄ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ I := by rw [h₂]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by rw [h₁]
      _ = y := by rw [h₃]
  exact h₄

have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ K = y := K.call y K
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ K := by rw [h₁]
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by rw [kestrel_application]
        _ = y := by rw [h₂]
  end KestrelTheorems
successful_attempts:
have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ K = y := K.call y K
      have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by rw [kestrel_application]
      have h₄ : x = y := by
        calc
          x = (K ◁ x) ◁ K := by rw [h₁]
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by rw [h₃]
          _ = y := by rw [h₂]
      exact h₄

have h₁ := K.call x x
      have h₂ := K.call y x
      have h₃ := K.call x y
      have h₄ := K.call y y
      have h₅ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by simpa [response] using K.call x x
      have h₆ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by simpa [response] using K.call y x
      have h₇ : (K ◁ x) ◁ y = x := by simpa [response] using K.call x y
      have h₈ : (K ◁ y) ◁ y = y := by simpa [response] using K.call y y
      have h₉ : (K ◁ x) = (K ◁ y) := kestrel_application
      have h₁₀ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₉]
      have h₁₁ : x = y := by
        calc
          x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₅]
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₁₀]
          _ = y := by rw [h₆]
      exact h₁₁

have h₁ := K.call x x
      have h₂ := K.call y x
      have h₃ := K.call x y
      have h₄ := K.call y y
      have h₅ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
        calc
          (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
            have h₆ := K.call x x
            exact h₆
          _ = x := by rfl
      have h₆ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
        calc
          (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
            have h₇ := K.call y x
            exact h₇
          _ = y := by rfl
      have h₇ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
        calc
          (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := rfl
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
            have h₈ : K ◁ x = K ◁ y := kestrel_application
            rw [h₈]
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := rfl
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
          have h₈ := K.call x x
          have h₉ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
            calc
              (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
                have h₁₀ := K.call x x
                exact h₁₀
              _ = x := by rfl
          rw [h₉]
          <;> simp_all
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₇]
        _ = y := by
          have h₈ := K.call y x
          have h₉ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
            calc
              (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
                have h₁₀ := K.call y x
                exact h₁₀
              _ = y := by rfl
          rw [h₉]
          <;> simp_all
